nasb.text: “To the angel of the church in Ephesus write: The One who holds the seven stars in His right hand, the One who walks among the seven golden lampstands, says this:

esv.text: “To the angel of the church in Ephesus write: ‘The words of     him who holds the seven stars in his right hand,     who walks among the seven golden lampstands.

cnv.text: “你要寫信給在以弗所教會的使者，說： 　‘那右手拿著七星，在七個金燈臺中間行走的，這樣說：

ccb.text: “你要写信告诉以弗所教会的天使，那位右手拿着七颗星、往来于七个金灯台中间的主说，

csbs.text: “你要给那在以弗所教会的使者    写信说： “那位右手握着七颗星、在七座金灯台中间行走的，这样说：
